examples: There are several free hours every weekday.
If you normally do your fruit shopping on Saturday, choose a weekday night to go instead.
On a recent weekday, they sprayed smoke on the hotel terrace to calm the bees before extracting honey.
Charles Newman gets deliveries at his Dexter, Michigan recycling factory, up to 10 tons each weekday.
"I think the weekday should be spent in the office, at work, " he says.
